title: MarketingContent Input
description: Validated inputs for marketing-content skill execution

action.description: The marketing content operation to perform

framework.description: Copywriting framework to apply (optional; will be recommended based on audience stage if omitted)

platform.description: Target content platform (required for write-copy and plan-campaign actions)

audience_stage.description: Audience awareness stage used to recommend the appropriate copywriting framework

topic.description: The topic, product, or campaign subject to create content for

goal.description: Primary business goal for the content

kpi.description: Primary KPI to measure success (e.g., open_rate, CTR, conversion_rate)

duration_days.description: Campaign or calendar duration in days
